firstName error disappears when filled

email shows error on blur when empty
country shows error on blur when empty
email shows format error for invalid email
email accepts valid email format
phone shows format error for invalid phone
phone accepts valid phone format
phone allows empty value (optional field)
postalCode shows format error for invalid code
postalCode accepts valid format
company fields are hidden by default
company fields appear when isCompany is enabled
company fields hide when isCompany is disabled
courier date field appears when delivery type is courier
pickup point field appears when delivery type is pickup
card fields appear when payment method is card
promo code field appears when hasPromoCode is enabled
gift message appears when giftWrap is enabled
companyName required only when isCompany is true
companyTaxId required with format validation when isCompany is true
courierDate required only when deliveryType is courier
pickupPoint required only when deliveryType is pickup
card fields required only when paymentMethod is card
cardNumber format validation
cardExpiry format validation
promoCode required only when hasPromoCode is true
quantity must be at least 1
quantity must be at most 100
pricePerUnit must be greater than 0
discount must be between 0 and 50
agreeTerms switch toggles correctly
agreePrivacy switch toggles correctly
can fill minimum required fields for individual order
can fill form as company with card payment
reset button clears all fields
